name: Rechargeable Battery Bluetooth Speaker - dealworthy™ Black: Portable, Wireless USB Connection
description:
Bring the beats wherever you go with the Rechargeable Battery Bluetooth Speaker from dealworthy™ in Black. With a 33 ft. wireless range and up to 4 hours of battery life, it’s perfect for backyard hangs, small gatherings or solo jam sessions. Compact yet powerful, this speaker is your go-to for music on the move.

dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.™
